library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(stringr)

# Read the CSV data from my Project 2 Google Form
data_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRd6gPY3y4sbUCQonm7al3l3izO2Obztur_t3xGwrmIZ4_tNcZmN2QeLQHeoSuokzBUe7zYedECC91s/pub?gid=187295818&single=true&output=csv"

logged_data <- read_csv(data_url)

# Rename the columns to make them easier to use in R
colnames(logged_data) <- c("Timestamp", "location", "time_period", "purpose", "duration")

# Clean and prepare the data
logged_data <- logged_data %>%
  mutate(
    Timestamp = parse_date_time(
      Timestamp,
      orders = c("dmy HMS", "mdy HMS", "ymd HMS", "dmy IMp", "mdy IMp")
    ),
    location = as.factor(location),
    time_period = factor(
      time_period,
      levels = c(
        "Morning (6:00 am–11:59 am)",
        "Afternoon (12:00 pm–5:59 pm)",
        "Evening (6:00 pm–9:59 pm)",
        "Late night (10:00 pm–1:59 am)"
      )
    ),
    purpose = as.factor(purpose),
    duration = as.numeric(duration),
    long_session = if_else(duration >= 180, "Long session", "Shorter session")
  )

# Plot 1: Study sessions by location
location_plot <- ggplot(logged_data, aes(x = location)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Observed Study Sessions by Location",
    x = "Study Location",
    y = "Number of Observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

location_plot


# Plot 2: Main purposes of study sessions
purpose_summary <- logged_data %>%
  group_by(purpose) %>%
  summarise(
    observations = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(observations))

purpose_plot <- ggplot(purpose_summary,
                       aes(x = reorder(purpose, observations), y = observations)) +
  geom_col(fill = "lightgreen") +
  labs(
    title = "Main Purposes of Study Sessions",
    x = "Study Purpose",
    y = "Number of Observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  coord_flip()

purpose_plot


# Plot 3: Study purposes across different time periods
purpose_time_summary <- logged_data %>%
  count(purpose, time_period)

purpose_time_plot <- ggplot(purpose_time_summary,
                            aes(x = time_period, y = purpose, size = n)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, colour = "orange") +
  labs(
    title = "Study Purposes Across Different Time Periods",
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Study Purpose",
    size = "Number of Observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

purpose_time_plot


# Plot 4: Cumulative observations logged over time
timestamp_summary <- logged_data %>%
  arrange(Timestamp) %>%
  mutate(cumulative_observations = row_number())

timestamp_plot <- ggplot(timestamp_summary,
                         aes(x = Timestamp, y = cumulative_observations)) +
  geom_line(group = 1, colour = "purple") +
  geom_point(colour = "purple", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Observations Logged Over Time",
    x = "Timestamp",
    y = "Cumulative Number of Observations"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

timestamp_plot
